context: Evaluates the agent's ability to create a new behavioural rule from a natural language user request, following the required three-part format (title, directive, rationale) while preserving existing rules.

checklist.name: Existing rules preserved
checklist.description: Existing .agents/RULES.md content is preserved without modification or deletion

checklist.name: Directive phrasing
checklist.description: Directive uses NEVER or ALWAYS phrasing

checklist.name: User notification
checklist.description: User is informed that the rule was added
